subcodes.first_line: The Book hath appeared amidst humanity when moved My Most Exalted Pen, whereby the Trump was sounded and the Day of Resurrection was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ظهر بین الوری اذ تحرک قلمی الاعلی الذی به نفخ فی الصور و ظهر یوم النشور و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @power of prayer, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
